reason: The authorized P13/P15 dense review produced no accepted Sakai landmark correspondence. P15 waterfront workshop evidence was explicitly tied to Amagasaki, while P13 retained only unanchored Sakai candidates. Sakai-specific continuous traversal evidence is required before any footprint is modeled.

existingAuthorizedSourceAudit.result: no additional already-authorized Sakai-specific continuous urban walkthrough was identified beyond the analyzed Eleven catalog material

evidenceTargets.need: continuous traversal through the Sakai Firearm District with visible building fronts, intersections, gates and street width
Imai house, the adjacent main street and the followed route toward the office, including repeated landmarks from more than one direction
Port of Sakai, long pier, Money Changer District and the road or canal connections between them
southwest coastal shops, vendor area, large ship, shoreline access and nearby building blocks
north-side stream, tea merchant route, bridges or crossings and surrounding buildings
extended free roam around the city perimeter plus elevated views that relate roof blocks to streets and waterfront

required: permission to download the public video transiently for local project analysis
permission for computer-vision analysis and private low-resolution keyframe review
permission to create original derived 2D or low-detail 3D reconstructions of buildings, roads, terrain and water relationships
permission to publish the resulting original interactive map and non-pixel derived structural data
permission to cite the author name, video title and original video link as attribution
excluded: no redistribution of the full original video
no public publication of extracted source frames
no sublicensing of the original video
no commercial, advertising or paid use unless separately approved in writing
authorizationRequestScope.suggestedChineseRequest: 你好，我们正在制作一个非商业的《刺客信条：影》原创互动地图项目，希望在获得你明确许可后，从公开视频页面临时下载你的视频用于本地分析，提取不公开的低清关键帧来研究堺城的房屋、街道、港口和地形关系，并据此重新制作原创2D或低模3D地图。我们不会转载完整视频、不会公开原始画面，会在地图资料中标注作者、视频标题和原链接。请问你是否同意上述范围？商业化、广告或收费使用不包含在本次申请中。
